mapper.sql: id, user_id, project_id, week_start, week_end, completed_work, next_week_plan, problems, status, submit_time, approve_time, approver_id, approve_comment, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_weekly_report ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_weekly_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_weekly_report WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_weekly_report WHERE week_start = #{weekStart} AND week_end = #{weekEnd} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_weekly_report (id, user_id, project_id, week_start, week_end, completed_work, next_week_plan, problems, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{projectId}, #{weekStart}, #{weekEnd}, #{completedWork}, #{nextWeekPlan}, #{problems}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_weekly_report SET project_id = #{projectId}, week_start = #{weekStart}, week_end = #{weekEnd}, completed_work = #{completedWork}, next_week_plan = #{nextWeekPlan}, problems = #{problems}, status = #{status}, submit_time = #{submitTime}, approve_time = #{approveTime}, approver_id = #{approverId}, approve_comment = #{approveComment}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_weekly_report WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_weekly_report WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_weekly_report WHERE status = #{status}
